ground_truth.title: Cross-Border CBDC Interoperability: Technical Standards and Geopolitical Implications
ground_truth.abstract: We survey cross-border CBDC initiatives (mBridge, Project Dunbar) and evaluate the role of technical interoperability standards (ISO 20022, atomic swaps) in shaping dollar hegemony under digital currency regimes.
